prompt: Write 3 cold-outreach DMs (under 300 chars each, plain text, no emojis) to US patent attorneys about openpatent.ai. Each DM must (a) name a specific pain point (AI idea theft, lack of court-admissible timestamps, $10k+ legal defense), (b) position the $10 self-serve OTS disclosure as the answer, (c) end with one specific CTA. Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {dms:[3 strings], signature:string} where signature is the canonical DEFONEOS line.
